title: Shipton
bodyText:
[[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s home: a lakeside town, **destroyed** by its own priest's drowning-storm generations ago.

# The fall — "The Priest's Descent" (canon-adjacent poem)
**Kol**, priest of [[torm|Torm]], unhinged by loss, became obsessed with sacrifice and **burned his own daughter Trista**. The villagers burned his church; Kol's storm drowned the town.

*"Young Edrelon fled the roaring tide... the storm drove him to a hidden cave, its black depths swallowed the boy, unmade. Beneath the lake, beneath the roar, Shipton sleeps forevermore."*

> [!dm] **The lake, the storm, and [[the-pool|the pool]] are the same phenomenon.**
> - **Edrelon ≈ Eddy's mind-layer** (his *soul* is Silus — [[pc-eddy]] trinity). [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] knows a Shipton childhood story about self-sacrifice.
> - **Lean (grill 2026-07-09): Kol did NOT die** — the Pool kept him alive; he is the present-day **[[pool-wizard|Pool Wizard]]**. Fuller fall: he was *testing* self-sacrifice (Trista), the town revolted, and in panic he **summoned — maybe by accident — the wave/pool** that drowned Shipton, then read it as divine confirmation. Not 100% locked, but a strong tie-in.
